name: Nyx
description:
Palatte AU (1/3)

This is NOT Panic Nyx, he's not love crazed

Nyx, Nel, and Neo. Hopefully their singles go well. It seems condescending/antagonistic characters do really well with you guys, considering how Serial Designation L and Z have been doing, with 1.8 and 1.6k respectively.
creator: Showman682
